name: scale-zero-pg
description: Database layer of the unified knext platform — the wake-on-connect Postgres gateway + AppDatabase/zone operators (Go + Kubernetes). Not a JS package; these scripts let turbo orchestrate its own toolchain so `turbo run … --affected` builds/tests it when it changes.

scripts.test: cd gateway && go test ./... && cd ../deploy && python3 -m unittest discover -s . -p 'test_skctl.py' && bash test_provision-app.sh
